# [Clang] Assertion failure `Tok.is(tok::semi)' while parsing malformed decltype with anonymous union

**Author:** YuchangSu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/188014
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer

## Body

Code:

```CPP
&  decltype ( ( union {
```

Assertion:
```text
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Parse/ParseDeclCXX.cpp:1085: clang::SourceLocation clang::Parser::ParseDecltypeSpecifier(clang::DeclSpec&): Assertion `Tok.is(tok::semi)' failed.
```
